an10.39:1.0.1: Atha kho āyasmā ānando yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
an10.39:1.0.2: "Samaggaṁ pana, bhante, saṅghaṁ bhinditvā kiṁ so pasavatī"ti?
an10.39:1.0.3: Āpāyiko nerayiko,Kappaṭṭho saṅghabhedako;Vaggarato adhammaṭṭho,Yogakkhemā padhaṁsati;Saṅghaṁ samaggaṁ bhinditvā,Kappaṁ nirayamhi paccatī"ti.
